title: grewia astropetala
intro: Grewia astropetala, also known as the star-petaled shrub or star-flowered hawthorn, is a plant species in the family Malvaceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Grewia astropetala include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures for medicinal purposes.
